message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
' in: https://www.plantuml.com/plantuml/uml/XL1BQjCm4D9NlXzr3A0t8F7Y6Z5W4V3U2T1S0R9Q8P7O6N5M4L3K2J1I0H9G8F7E6D5C4B3A2Z1Y0X9W8V7U6T5S4R3Q2P1O0N9M8L7K6J5I4H3G2F1E0D9C8B7A6Z5Y4X3W2V1U0T9S8R7Q6P5O4N3M2L1K0J9I8H7G6F5E4D3C2B1A0

skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class Player {
  <<C>>
  log: Logger
  id: Integer
  start_field: ConnectedField
  pieces: List of Piece
  home: List of HomeField
  dest: List of Field
  name: String
  +id: Integer
  +start_field: ConnectedField
  +home: List of HomeField
  +dest: List of Field
  Player(
    log: Logger,
    player_id: Integer,
    start_field: ConnectedField,
    home_obsv: (
      Callable<owner: Integer, field: Integer>,
      Callable<owner: Integer, field: Integer>
    ),
    dest_obsv: (
      Callable<owner: Integer, field: Integer>,
      Callable<owner: Integer, field: Integer>
    ),
  ): Player
  init_home(
    obsv: (
      Callable<owner: Integer, field: Integer>,
      Callable<owner: Integer, field: Integer>
    )
  )
  init_dest(
    obsv: (
      Callable<owner: Integer, field: Integer>,
      Callable<owner: Integer, field: Integer>
    )
  )
  +calc_dests(distance: Integer)
  +can_move(): Boolean
  +can_throw(): Boolean
  +has_won(): Boolean
  wrap_obsv(
    obsv: (
      Callable<owner: Integer, field: Integer>,
      Callable<owner: Integer, field: Integer>
    )
  ): (
    Callable<field: Integer>,
    Callable<field: Integer>
  )
  +__str__(): String
}

class Game {
  <<C>>
  log: Logger
  die: Die
  players: List of Player
  all_players: List of Player
  active_player_idx: Integer
  track: List of ConnectedField
  tries: Integer
  allow_move: Boolean
  -active_player: Player
  end_turn_obsv: Callable<player: Integer>
  begin_turn_obsv: Callable<player: Integer>
  home_vacated_obsv: Callable<owner: Integer, field: Integer>
  home_filled_obsv: Callable<owner: Integer, field: Integer, place: Integer>
  track_vacated_obsv: Callable<field: Integer>
  track_filled_obsv: Callable<field: Integer, place: Integer>
  dest_vacated_obsv: Callable<owner: Integer, field: Integer>
  dest_filled_obsv: Callable<owner: Integer, field: Integer, place: Integer>
  game_end_obsv: Callable<winner: Integer>
  Game(
    log: Logger,
    end_turn_obsv: Callable<player: Integer>,
    begin_turn_obsv: Callable<player: Integer>,
    home_vacated_obsv: Callable<owner: Integer, field: Integer>,
    home_filled_obsv: Callable<owner: Integer, field: Integer, place: Integer>,
    track_vacated_obsv: Callable<field: Integer>,
    track_filled_obsv: Callable<field: Integer, place: Integer>,
    dest_vacated_obsv: Callable<owner: Integer, field: Integer>,
    dest_filled_obsv: Callable<owner: Integer, field: Integer, place: Integer>,
    game_end_obsv: Callable<winner: Integer>,
  ): Game
  -init_track()
  +set_players(players: Iterator over (Integer, Boolean))
  +roll_die(): Integer
  +try_move_home(owner_id: Integer, field_id: Integer)
  +try_move_track(field_id: Integer)
  +try_move_dest(owner_id: Integer, field_id: Integer)
  +allow_move()
  -try_move(src: Field)
  -player(num: int): Player
  -end_move()
  -next_player()
  -begin_turn()
  -begin_move()
}

class Die {
  <<C>>
  log: Logger
  pips: Integer
  Die(log: Logger): Die
  +roll()
  +get(): Integer
  +__str__(): String
}

class HomeField {
  <<C>>
  HomeField(
    field_id: Integer,
    log: Logger,
    start_field: Field,
    vacate_obsv: Callback<field: Integer>,
    fill_obsv: Callable<field: Integer, place: Integer>,
  ): HomeField
  +try_dest(player: Player, distance: Integer): Optional Field
  #skip(distance: Integer, player: Player): Optional Field
}

class ConnectedField {
  <<C>>
  next_field: Field
  ConnectedField(
    field_id: Integer,
    log: Logger,
    name: String,
    vacate_obsv: Callable<field: Integer>,
    fill_obsv: Callable<field: Integer, place: Integer>,
  ): ConnectedField
  +connect_next(next_field: Field)
  +try_dest(player: Player, distance: Integer): Optional Field
  +is_packed(): Boolean
  #skip(distance: Integer, player: Player)
  -player_next_field(player: Player): Field
}

class Piece {
  <<C>>
  log: Logger
  owner: Player
  location: Field
  dest: Optional Field
  +owner: Player
  +dest: Optional Field
  Piece(
    log: Logger,
    piece_id: Integer,
    owner: Player,
    location: HomeField,
  ): Piece
  +calc_dest(distance: Integer)
  +move_to_home()
  +move_to_dest()
  -move_to(dest: Field)
  +__str__(): String
}

class Field {
  <<C>>
  *log: Logger
  id: Integer
  piece: Piece
  +id: Integer
  +piece: Piece
  +occupant: Player
  vacated_obsv: Callable<field: Integer>
  filled_obsv: Callable<field: Integer, place: Integer>
  Field(
    field_id: Integer,
    log: Logger,
    name: String,
    vacate_obsv: Callable<field: Integer>,
    fill_obsv: Callable<field: Integer, place: Integer>,
  ): Field
  +vacate()
  +fill(piece: Piece)
  +try_dest(player: Player, distance: Integer): Optional Field
  +is_packed(): Boolean
  #skip(distance: Integer): Optional Field
}

Player "1" --o "4" Piece : 
Piece "0..1" --> "1" Field : 
Piece "1" --> "0..1" Field : 
HomeField "1" --> "1" Field : 
ConnectedField "1" --> "1" Field : 
Game "1" --> "1" Die : 
Game "1" --> "40" ConnectedField : 
Game "1" --> "3" Field : 
Game "1" --> "1" Player : 

@enduml
```
